interaction_phrase: led by senior finance executive and CERN Quantum Physicist Markus Pflitsch
occurrence_sentence: Terra Quantum is a Swiss-based deep tech incubator focused on Quantum technology applications founded in 2019 with top-notch management led by senior finance executive and CERN Quantum Physicist Markus Pflitsch.
